mainEntity.name: How long does it take for a Chicago law firm to show up in Perplexity results?
mainEntity.text: How long does it take for a Chicago law firm to show up in Perplexity results?

acceptedAnswer.text: Chicago law firms typically see Perplexity visibility in 3-6 months with consistent AEO efforts, or 12-18 months in saturated practice areas like personal injury due to competition.

suggestedAnswer.text: Timeline varies by niche: family law in Chicago may appear faster (2-4 months) via FAQ optimization, while criminal defense needs 6-12 months for authority buildup. Monitor with tools tracking AI mentions; refine content quarterly. High-competition Chicago requires ongoing updates to match evolving Perplexity algorithms.

name: Timeline to Rank in Perplexity for Chicago Firms
